LAW AND MOTION 301, TO PAY COSTS AND FEES OF SETTLEMENT CONTINUED FROM DEC-04-2001 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JAN-02-2002, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II RECUSED HIMSELF FROM HEARING THIS MATTER. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ORDERED VACATED AND CLASS PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO PAY COSTS AND FEES OF SETTLMENT ADMINISTRATION AND TO DISBURSE THE NET SETTLEMENT FUND TO ALL ELIGIBLE CLAIMANTS WAS ORDERED CONTINUED TO JANUARY 2, 2002 FOR HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 301. (THE CLERK CALLED JOSEPH M. PATANE, ESQ. AT 563-7200 AT 11:00 A.M. AND INFORMED HIM OF THIS CONTINUANCE.) JUDGE ROBERTSON; JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-02-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

To Pay Costs And Fees Of Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-04-2001 Continued To Jan-02-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II recused himself from hearing this matter. The tentative ruling was ordered vacated and Class PLAINTIFFS motion to pay costs and fees of settlment administration and to disburse the net settlement fund to all eligible claimants was ordered continued to JANUARY 2, 2002 for hearing in Department 301. (The clerk called Joseph M. Patane, Esq. at 563-7200 at 11:00 a.m. and informed him of this continuance.) (AJR/sl) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
